name: Lead CRM Sync - Kommo Writer MVP

parameters.query:
-- Get qualified leads that haven't been synced to CRM yet
-- Join contacts, qualifications, and messages to build complete payload
SELECT 
  l.id AS lead_id,
  l.public_number,
  l.source,
  l.utm_source,
  l.utm_campaign,
  l.created_at AS lead_created_at,
  c.name AS contact_name,
  c.phone AS contact_phone,
  c.email AS contact_email,
  c.company AS contact_company,
  q.lead_type,
  q.interest,
  q.priority,
  q.category,
  q.summary,
  q.confidence,
  q.suggested_action,
  q.reasoning,
  q.ai_model,
  q.processed_at AS qualification_processed_at,
  m.content AS first_message
FROM leads l
INNER JOIN contacts c ON l.contact_id = c.id
INNER JOIN qualifications q ON q.lead_id = l.id
LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.lead_id = l.id AND m.direction = 'inbound'
WHERE l.status = 'qualified'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM crm_sync cs 
    WHERE cs.lead_id = l.id 
    AND cs.sync_status = 'success'
  )
ORDER BY l.created_at ASC
LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO crm_sync (
    lead_id,
    crm_type,
    kommo_lead_id,
    kommo_contact_id,
    kommo_pipeline_id,
    kommo_pipeline_name,
    kommo_status_id,
    kommo_status_name,
    kommo_responsible_user_id,
    crm_has_active_task,
    crm_closest_task_at,
    crm_closed_at,
    crm_synced_at,
    initial_task_created,
    sync_status,
    sync_error,
    created_at
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.lead_id }}',
    'kommo',
    {{ $json.kommo_lead_id ? $json.kommo_lead_id : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.kommo_contact_id ? $json.kommo_contact_id : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.kommo_pipeline_id ? $json.kommo_pipeline_id : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.kommo_pipeline_name ? "'" + $json.kommo_pipeline_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.kommo_status_id ? $json.kommo_status_id : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.kommo_status_name ? "'" + $json.kommo_status_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.kommo_responsible_user_id ? $json.kommo_responsible_user_id : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.crm_has_active_task ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }},
    {{ $json.crm_closest_task_at ? "'" + $json.crm_closest_task_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.crm_closed_at ? "'" + $json.crm_closed_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.crm_synced_at ? "'" + $json.crm_synced_at + "'" : 'NOW()' }},
    {{ $json.initial_task_created ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE' }},
    '{{ $json.sync_status }}',
    {{ $json.sync_error ? "'" + $json.sync_error.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    NOW()
) RETURNING id, lead_id, kommo_lead_id, sync_status, created_at;

INSERT INTO crm_sync (
    lead_id,
    crm_type,
    kommo_lead_id,
    sync_status,
    sync_error,
    synced_at,
    created_at
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.lead_id }}',
    'kommo',
    {{ $json.kommo_lead_id ? $json.kommo_lead_id : 'NULL' }},
    '{{ $json.sync_status }}',
    {{ $json.sync_error ? "'" + $json.sync_error.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.synced_at ? "'" + $json.synced_at + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    NOW()
) RETURNING id, lead_id, sync_status, created_at;

UPDATE leads
SET status = 'processed',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.lead_id }}'
RETURNING id, status, updated_at;

INSERT INTO logs (
    lead_id,
    event_type,
    event_data,
    status,
    error_message,
    created_at
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.lead_id }}',
    '{{ $json.event_type }}',
    '{{ $json.event_data }}',
    '{{ $json.status }}',
    {{ $json.error_message ? "'" + $json.error_message.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    NOW()
) RETURNING id, lead_id, event_type, status, created_at;

INSERT INTO logs (
    lead_id,
    event_type,
    event_data,
    status,
    error_message,
    created_at
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.lead_id }}',
    '{{ $json.event_type }}',
    '{{ $json.event_data }}',
    '{{ $json.status }}',
    {{ $json.error_message ? "'" + $json.error_message.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    NOW()
) RETURNING id, lead_id, event_type, status, created_at;
